title: Comcast Corporation (CMCSA) Economic Prospect Score
description: A forward-looking economic prospect analysis of Comcast Corporation (CMCSA), scoring competitive momentum, moat durability, and sentiment signals.
verdictDetail: Comcast is a broadband and media conglomerate facing secular headwinds in linear TV (NBCUniversal, cable) offset by broadband stability and Peacock streaming growth. The broadband business has strong margins but faces fiber and fixed wireless competition. Theme parks add diversification.
keyRisks: Broadband subscriber losses to fiber (AT&T, Google Fiber) and fixed wireless (T-Mobile, Verizon) accelerating
Linear TV advertising and affiliate fee revenue declining as cord-cutting continues
Peacock streaming losses persisting as profitability requires scale that's hard to achieve against Netflix/Disney+
keyCatalysts: Broadband ARPU growth through speed tier upgrades and converged connectivity bundles offsetting subscriber losses
Peacock reaching profitability as content costs stabilize and advertising tier scales
Theme parks (Universal Epic Universe) driving revenue growth and diversification from media
methodology: Score is based on three pillars: Competitive Momentum (0-35), Moat Durability (0-35), and Sentiment & Catalysts (0-30), totaling 0-100. Each pillar is broken into individually scored factors with transparent rationale. Data sources include FY2025 10-K filings, analyst consensus estimates, news sentiment analysis, and competitive landscape assessment. The score is forward-looking and represents economic prospect over a 2-3 year horizon.
